content:
{
  "mnemonics": [
    "Eager Execution: Every time you call a method, it runs from the bottom up.",
    "Method Overriding: When a method with the same name and parameters is called from a child class.",
    "Dynamic Dispatch: The actual method called is determined at runtime, not at compile time.",
    "Create Abstract Class: Abstract classes cannot be instantiated, used to create interfaces.",
    "Final with Inheritance: Final variables in child class cannot be changed by the child class.",
